title: Duplicate of Subitem
excerpt: create an automation that duplicates a subitem a specific number of times based on its status. (e.g., if the status is set to 5, it duplicates 5 times)

posts.author: Yogesh_Ingole (Yogesh Ingole)
posts.cookedHtml: create an automation that duplicates a subitem a specific number of times based on its status. (e.g., if the status is set to 5, it duplicates 5 times)

posts.author: jhanold (Julia Hanold | OrangeDot | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can accomplish this but you’d have to create an automation for every option.

See below for example recipe:

When Status changes to 5

Duplicate subitem
Duplicate subitem
Duplicate subitem
Duplicate subitem
Duplicate subitem

Hope this helps and happy building!

Julia Hanold
Managing Director, OrangeDot - monday.com Platinum Partner

posts.author: sergeybrocardkevan (Sergey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.
Any updates on how to do this automatically?
I have to dynamically do this because It can get up to 36 subitems, or 44 subitems

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Yogesh_Ingole, @sergeybrocardkevan

If you’re open to 3rd party apps, you can use our Subitems Pro Automations app to achieve that. It includes recipe for creating a subitem specific number of times:

image344×263 8.08 KB

Or for each status or dropdown label:

image348×265 10 KB

If you have any questions or requests for custom automations, feel free to reach out to us!

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Yogesh_Ingole ,

I’m thrilled to inform you that we have an improved version of that automation in the Subitem Automations app!

Instead of using a Numbers column, you can use a Text column to write the names of the subitems that you want to automatically create (separated by a comma).

image2266×680 46.9 KB

Alternatively, you can also use a Dropdown column for the subitem names!

image2320×712 54 KB

Hope this helps! You can email me anytime at kevin@fantasymedia.io if you have any further questions or if you need help setting up Subitem Automations!

Cheers!
